title: Mirus Critical Care: Best ICU, Critical Care & Multispeciality Hospital in Lucknow
heading: Critical Care with Advanced Treatments & Trusted Healthcare
description: Mirus Critical Care is Lucknow’s best ICU and Emergency Hospital. Expert in Critical Care, Neurosurgery, Knee & Hip Replacement, Pacemaker Surgery, Trauma Care, and 24x7 Life-Saving Support. Visit today.

All Facilities at Mirus Patient Testimonials Healing with Excellence & Compassion What Our Patients Say "Saved My Life in Critical Condition" “Mirus Critical Care Hospital admitted me in an emergency. Their ICU team was quick,
                                    professional, and deeply caring. I owe my life to them." Sunita Verma, Housewife, Lucknow "World-Class Surgical Team" "I underwent knee replacement surgery at Mirus, and the results have been
                                    phenomenal. The orthopaedic care is truly world-class." Pradeep Singh, Retired Officerr "Best Care for My Father’s Cardiac Issue" “The CCU staff managed my father’s heart condition with utmost care. Their
                                    technology and human touch both impressed us." Alok Tiwarin, Entrepreneur "Critical ICU Support When We Needed It Most" “My brother was admitted with severe breathing issues. Mirus Critical Care’s ICU
                                    team acted promptly and provided advanced life support. We are forever grateful." Rekha Sharma, Teacher "Post-Operative Recovery Was Smooth & Safe" “After my mother's gallbladder surgery, the post-operative care and monitoring at
                                    Mirus were exceptional.
